positioning.headline: AI leader who builds strategy AND the platforms to execute it

differentiators.diff: Architect who codes: 4 McDonald's agents in production, WaivePath 8-agent system, Food Network Windows 8 app
Zero-to-one builder: Stratozone became Migration Center, Value Engineering 10X growth, accreditation standards still in use
Rapid executive engagement: Tribune CEO access in 1 week, AON competitive win, McDonald's CIO/VP adoption

metric.context: McDonald's AI strategy across 8 business functions
Microsoft/Tribune opportunity (capability demo led to Azure win)

position.title: Principal AI Architect (Generative AI)
position.highlights: 10-layer AI platform architecture, 325 use cases, 45+ artifacts

position.title: Founder & Principal
position.highlights: WaivePath sales enablement platform, Agentient AI co-founder platform

position.title: Head of Value Engineering
position.highlights: Stratozone acquisition (now Migration Center), $1.5B pipeline in 9 months (10X growth)

position.title: Principal Strategic Advisor
position.highlights: Enterprise security evangelist, first security specialist team

position.title: Principal Client Partner
position.highlights: $800M book of business, cloud services portfolio

position.title: Founder & Principal
position.highlights: WotCom app Top 10 in 4 countries, Top 200 in major markets

position.title: Senior Business Development Manager
position.highlights: $2.5M internal investment, Walmart partnership, Food Network launch app

position.title: Senior Platform Strategy Advisor
position.highlights: $3.3B Tribune opportunity identified (led to Azure win), AON competitive win vs Google, $1.5M Azure savings

position.title: Architect Evangelist
position.highlights: Office 2007 launch showcase, Circle of Excellence 2008

position.title: Enterprise Architect
position.highlights: Six Sigma Black Belt, 20% policy cycle reduction, 14% acceptance improvement

position.title: Managing Consultant / Practice Lead
position.highlights: Led 10 consultants, $1M AVSC deal, 5X performance improvement

position.title: Managing Consultant
position.highlights: CRM development, identity management system, auth framework

position.title: Trainee / System Software Programmer
position.highlights: Driver development, COBOL certification, Computer Science diploma

education.degree: Bachelor of Commerce - General Management + IT (UNISA, 2000)

credentials.awards-summary: 2x Circle of Excellence (Microsoft), MGX Best in Class, 3x Top Contributor, 2x Exceeds Expectations (Google), DEA Special Agent Award, USSS Contribution Award

career-summary.keywords: Generative AI, LLM, AI platform, AI architecture, multi-agent systems, RAG, prompt engineering, Google Cloud Platform, GCP, Azure, cloud migration, enterprise architecture, target state architecture, value engineering, TCO analysis, pipeline generation, program management, cross-functional leadership, C-level engagement, business development, Six Sigma, process improvement, technology evangelism
